query:
SELECT
                id              AS "id!: Uuid",
                project_id      AS "project_id!: Uuid",
                name            AS "name!",
                color           AS "color!",
                sort_order      AS "sort_order!",
                hidden          AS "hidden!",
                created_at      AS "created_at!: DateTime<Utc>"
            FROM project_statuses
            WHERE project_id = ANY($1)
            ORDER BY project_id, sort_order ASC
